error_signature: automatic workflow does not forward items
title: Filter node fails to forward items in automatic execution
symptom: The filter node does not forward items that meet the criteria during automatic execution, but works correctly in manual execution.
root_cause: The issue arises from a specific condition in the filter node that behaves differently in automatic execution compared to manual execution. The condition's logic may not be compatible with the data being processed in the automatic context, leading to no items being forwarded.
fix_steps: Identify and delete the problematic condition in the filter node.
Replace it with a similar condition that works correctly.
Test the workflow in automatic execution to ensure it forwards items as expected.
agent_instruction: Remove the problematic condition from the filter node and replace it with a working condition.
